session.assistant:
## All PR Comments Addressed
**Total comments:** 1 actionable review thread + 1 informational discussion comment **Batches:** 1 **Commits:** 1 (`a72946ee6`)
**Changes made:** - Fixed stale source pointers in `docs/learned/erk/same-worktree-navigation.md`: - `navigation_helpers.py:359` and `:904` → `:243` (consolidated into `activate_target()`) - `navigation_helpers.py:931-939` source pointer removed (file is 385 lines) - Call site count updated 5→4 - `branch/checkout_cmd.py:256` → `:251` - `wt/create_cmd.py` source pointer updated to `:908` - `shared_worktree` typo fixed to `same_worktree`
All review threads resolved.
**Next steps:** 1. Push: `gt submit` (Graphite) or `git push` 2. Wait for CI to pass 3. Request re-review if needed
